Description: A friendly model takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action with a Ranged Weapon Attack that has the Long Range and Cover modifiers.
Bible Verse: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, keeping watch on the evil and the good.

Description: A friendly model takes two enemy models Out of Action with Melee Attacks in a single Turn.
Bible Verse: The LORD is a warrior; the LORD is his name.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model to Fall from a height of at least 3."
Bible Verse: He cast them down from the heights and cast them into deep darkness.

Description: An attack made by a friendly model results in the sixth Blood Marker being placed beside an enemy model.
Bible Verse: The life of every creature is its blood.

Description: A Warband is the first to pass a Morale Check in this game. In a campaign game you can award 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader model.
Bible Verse: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.

Description: A friendly model successfully charges two models with the same charge move.
Bible Verse: One man of you puts to flight a thousand, for it is the LORD your God who fights for you.

Description: A friendly model that began its Activation Down takes an enemy model Out of Action in the same Activation.
Bible Verse: Though I have fallen, I will rise. Though I sit in darkness, the LORD will be my light.

Description: Take all of the enemy Marks Out of Action. The model that took the last Mark Out of Action is credited with completing this Glorious Deed.
Bible Verse: Strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Melee Attack with the Diving Charge modifier.
Bible Verse: He shot his arrows and scattered the enemy; he hurled his lightning bolts and routed them.

Description: An Asset takes an enemy Mark Out of Action.
Bible Verse: The lot is cast into the lap, but its every decision is from the LORD.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Ranged Weapon Attack that has the Long Range and Cover modifiers. Blast or auto-hit attacks cannot complete this deed.
Bible Verse: He makes my feet like the feet of a deer; he causes me to stand on the heights.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model to Fall into a crater.
Bible Verse: Pride goes before destruction, a haughty spirit before a fall.

Description: A model has been on all five Objectives.
Bible Verse: Who shall ascend the hill of the LORD? And who shall stand in his holy place?

Description: A Warband wins the game. Campaign only. No VP awarded, but 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader, Glory Points, and +1D6 Promotion Pool.
Bible Verse: Where, O death, is your victory? Where, O death, is your sting?

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Melee Attack with the Diving Charge modifier.
Bible Verse: He parted the heavens and came down; dark clouds were under his feet.

Description: A friendly model that is on an Objective takes an enemy model that is on a different, taller, Objective Out of Action with a Ranged Attack.
Bible Verse: Though you soar like the eagle and make your nest among the stars, from there I will bring you down.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model that is on an Objective to Fall and the Fall results in it being taken Out of Action.
Bible Verse: For dust you are, and to dust you shall return.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action with a Ranged Weapon Attack that has the Long Range and Cover modifiers.
Bible Verse: An archer drew his bow at random and hit the king of Israel between the sections of his armor.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model to Fall from a height of at least 3",He throws down the mighty without inquiry and sets others in their place."
Reference: A Heretic warrior hurls an enemy off a ruined tower, the victim falling past carved stonework into darkness below. Grim satisfaction on the attacker's face. Style: Frank Frazetta oil painting, grimdark WWI horror, vertiginous drop, dramatic light from above, deep shadow below. Portrait 2:3.

Description: A friendly model causes three enemy models to be taken Out of Action during the game.
Bible Verse: Without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness.

Description: A friendly model that began its Activation Down takes an enemy model Out of Action in the same Activation.
Bible Verse: Though I have fallen, I will rise.

Description: A friendly model claims two different Reliquaries during the game.
Bible Verse: Seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model that is within 1 of a Reliquary Marker to be taken Out of Action."
Bible Verse: Guard what has been entrusted to your care.

Description: The Attacker completes this deed if a friendly model destroys a Supply Cache Marker.
Bible Verse: He who is bold in the raid shall not go unpunished.

Description: The Attacker completes this deed if a friendly model destroys a second Supply Cache Marker.
Bible Verse: Their feet are swift to shed blood; ruin and misery are in their paths.

Description: A Warband is the first to pass a Morale Check in this game. In a campaign game you can award 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader model.
Bible Verse: Stand firm then, with the belt of truth buckled around your waist.

Description: The Defender completes this deed if a friendly model takes an enemy Out of Action if the enemy is fully or partially within their own Deployment Zone.
Bible Verse: Resist him, standing firm in the faith.

Description: A Warband wins the game. Campaign only. No VP awarded, but 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader, Glory Points, and +1D6 Promotion Pool.
Bible Verse: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

Description: The Defender completes this deed if there are four or more Supply Cache Markers that have not been destroyed at the end of the game.
Bible Verse: A wise man sees danger and takes refuge, but the simple keep going and suffer for it.

Description: A friendly model unlocks two different wagons.
Bible Verse: There will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down.

Description: Two friendly models escape with a crate. The model that escaped with the second crate is credited.
Bible Verse: Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much.

Description: A friendly model ends 3 consecutive Turns on top of an embankment or the bridge and within 3 of a wagon."
Bible Verse: I have learned, in whatever situation I am, to be content.

Description: A friendly model escapes with a crate when it is wholly within the enemy Deployment Zone.
Bible Verse: I will go before you and level the exalted places.

Description: A friendly model takes 3 enemy models Out of Action during the game using Ranged Attacks made with the Gun Battery.
Bible Verse: Shall the sword devour forever?

Description: A friendly model that has two Injury Rolls made for it caused by mine explosions and is not taken Out of Action by either explosion.
Bible Verse: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil.

Description: A friendly model successfully charges an enemy model in a trench section and then takes the enemy model Out of Action with a melee attack.
Bible Verse: They shall go down to the bars of Sheol, when there is rest in the dust.

Description: A friendly model that retreated earlier in its Activation takes one of the enemy models it retreated from Out of Action.
Bible Verse: Vengeance is mine; I will repay, says the Lord.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Ranged Attack that has the Long Range modifier.
Bible Verse: Your hand will find out all your enemies; your right hand will find out those who hate you.

Description: A Warband wins the game. Campaign only. No VP awarded, but 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader, Glory Points, and +1D6 Promotion Pool.
Bible Verse: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

Description: A Warband is the first to pass a Morale Check in this game. In a campaign game you can award 1 XP to 1 Elite Leader model.
Bible Verse: Be watchful, stand firm in the faith, act like men, be strong.

Description: A friendly model on top of the Dragon takes the Dragon Out of Action with a Melee Attack. Worth 2 Glory Points.
Bible Verse: In that day the LORD with his hard and great and strong sword will punish Leviathan the fleeing serpent.

Description: A model takes 3 Peasants Out of Action.
Bible Verse: Do not spare them; put to death men and women, children and infants.

Description: A model is within 3 of a Peasant when the Peasant is trampled by the Dragon."
Bible Verse: The one who watches the wind will not sow, and the one who looks at the clouds will not reap.

Description: A friendly model takes a model that is on top of the Dragon Down, and the model then Falls off the Dragon.
Bible Verse: He who digs a pit will fall into it.

Description: An attack made by a friendly model with the Fire, Gas and/or Shrapnel Keyword causes 2 Blood Markers to be placed next to the Dragon.
Bible Verse: Our God is a consuming fire.

Description: A friendly model that has been poisoned uses a Bloodbath Roll to take an enemy model that has been poisoned Out of Action.
Bible Verse: They are filled with all manner of unrighteousness; full of envy, murder, strife, deceit.

Description: A friendly model extracts 3 Ichor Vials.
Bible Verse: Apply your heart to instruction and your ear to words of knowledge.

Description: A friendly model extracts an Ichor Vial when it is wholly within the enemy Deployment Zone.
Bible Verse: Is anything too hard for the LORD?

Description: A friendly model causes an explosion that takes 2 or more enemy models Out of Action.
Bible Verse: Is anything too hard for the LORD?

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model to be taken Out of Action by causing it to move into an Ichor Pit.
Bible Verse: The wicked plots against the righteous and gnashes his teeth at him.

Description: A friendly model steals an Ichor Vial from an enemy model and then manages to extract it.
Bible Verse: You shall not steal.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model Out of Action with a Melee Attack with the Diving Charge modifier.
Bible Verse: He shot his arrows and scattered the enemy; he hurled his lightning bolts and routed them.

Description: A friendly model takes two enemy models with the Elite Keyword Out of Action.
Bible Verse: The mighty man and the soldier, the judge and the prophet, the diviner and the elder.

Description: A friendly model successfully charges an enemy model that it did not have a Line of Sight to at the start of its activation.
Bible Verse: Where can I go from your Spirit? Where can I flee from your presence?

Description: A friendly model uses a Bloodbath Roll to take an enemy model Out of Action if the enemy model had taken a friendly model Out of Action earlier in the game.
Bible Verse: Vengeance is mine; I will repay, says the Lord.

Description: A friendly model takes three enemy models Out of Action.
Bible Verse: Put in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe. Go in, tread, for the winepress is full.

Description: A friendly model takes two Risky Success Rolls in the same Activation, and both are a Success or Critical Success.
Bible Verse: Cast your bread upon the waters, for you will find it after many days.

Description: A friendly model takes an enemy model that is on Dangerous or Difficult terrain Out of Action.
Bible Verse: Even on the wicked he will rain coals; fire and sulfur and scorching wind shall be their portion.

Description: A Warband captures a Trench section that is at least 6 long and is wholly within 8" of the enemy Deployment Zone."
Bible Verse: They rush on the city; they run on the wall; they climb into the houses; they enter through the windows like a thief.

Description: A friendly model causes a Gas Cloud Marker that is more than 14 away from it to explode
Bible Verse: and the explosion takes one or more enemy models Out of Action."
Reference: The smoke of their torment goes up forever and ever.

Description: A friendly model causes a Gas Cloud Marker to explode, and the explosion takes two or more enemy models Out of Action.
Bible Verse: And fire came out from the LORD and consumed them.

Description: A friendly model causes an enemy model to be taken Out of Action by causing it to move within 6 of the centre of a Gas Cloud Marker."
Bible Verse: The LORD God breathed into his nostrils the breath of life, and the man became a living creature.

Description: A Warband controls a Bunker that is within 6 of the centre of a Gas Cloud Marker at the end of two consecutive Turns."
Bible Verse: He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will abide in the shadow of the Almighty.

Description: A friendly model that is within 6 of the centre of a Gas Cloud makes a Melee Attack that takes an enemy model Out of Action."
Bible Verse: Their wine is the poison of serpents and the cruel venom of asps.
